name: Interview
statement:
Blake is a CEO of a large company called "Blake Technologies". He loves his company very much and he thinks that his company should be the best. That is why every candidate needs to pass through the interview that consists of the following problem.
We define function f(x, l, r) as a bitwise OR of integers xl, xl + 1, ..., xr, where xi is the i-th element of the array x. You are given two arrays a and b of length n. You need to determine the maximum value of sum f(a, l, r) + f(b, l, r) among all possible 1 ≤ l ≤ r ≤ n.
tutorial:
You should know only one fact to solve this task: . This fact can be proved by the truth table. Let's use this fact: . Also . According two previous formulas we can get that f(a, 1, n) ≥ f(a, i, j). Finally we can get the answer. It's equal to f(a, 1, N) + f(b, 1, N).
